text: dinosaurs ruled the earth for 160

from space
this is the story of how the era of

the planet's climate changed several

have formed at the poles
winters have become harsher
in some places the temperature dropped

conifers ginkgo and other trees from

the sod produced by these trees made the

with the advent of flowering plants

butterflies and bees started to fly
spreading pollen
seeded fruits developed from pollinated

this was what drove the evolution of

as well as many mammalian species
the number of carnivores ungulates

the day terrestrial life was changed

all animals young and old were going

these giants were herbivores
they had to consume up to a ton of

meanwhile one adult

this 4.5 meter long dinosaur weighed

its skull was protected by a 25
centimeter thick bone dome
that surely softened the blows when the

pachycephalosaurus was primarily

however it appears this dinosaur also

it ate small amphibians shellless

on this day our pachycephalosaurus got

it could also eat plenty of huge

it reached the size of a rhinoceros or

ankylosaurus was a harmless herbivore
the mother with the cubs didn't seek to
kill anyone with her club
the tale served to protect
against predators and cannibal reptiles

ago
t-rex had an excellent sense of smell

and in terms of eyesight precision even

in addition the reptile's vision was

this enabled the dinosaur to accurately

and so the t-rex furiously attacked the

you see this dinosaur never missed a

kind
it was up to carnotaurus now to fight
back

its muscle mass and therefore strength

even with its horn-like projections

lions as it was preoccupied with lunch

ten minutes till the impact
a huge asteroid was approaching the

in a few minutes it will kill 75
of all living creatures causing the
cretaceous paleogene extinction event
in 1980 scientists proposed a hypothesis
that it was the asteroid impact that led
to this disaster
they found far more iridium in 66
million year old clays around the world
than in layers above and below
this is a very rare substance on earth
but there's a lot of it in some types of
asteroids which is why iridium is
sometimes dubbed a space metal
scientists suggested that the metal was

ten years later another team of

in addition 25

these creatures died on the same day at

while our tyrannosaurus was enjoying its

a 10 kilometer rock weighing several
trillion tons flew into the atmosphere
the gravity's pull was becoming

like a piston the asteroid squashed one

along with friction
this process heated the giant rock to

making it much brighter than the sun
at the same time the tyrannosaurus was

the dinosaur quickly lowered its head
closing its eyes but the light was

the heat incinerated the reptile skin
set fire to the trees and grass around

the asteroid disappeared over the
horizon
leaving the glowing sky behind
tyrannosaurus rex got a little break

nothing was happening for a few seconds

the asteroid crashed into the gulf of

the energy released by the impact was
